case_title: LAURENCE SIEGEL VS. MATT NAWROCKI ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURNED MAIL: PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM MAILED BY CERTIFIED MAIL TO STACY NAWROCKI RETURNED= RETURN TO SENDER, UNCLAIMED, UNABLE TO FORWARD
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT NAWROCKI, MATT NAWROCKI, STACY
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIEGEL, LAURENCE AS TO DEFENDANT NAWROCKI, MATT
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF SIEGEL, LAURENCE AS TO DEFENDANT NAWROCKI, STACY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF DEFENDANT (FEE FOR SERVICE:$NOT GIVEN) SERVED JAN-12-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SIEGEL, LAURENCE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,381.59 FILED BY SIEGEL, LAURENCE AS TO DEFENDANT NAWROCKI, MATT NAWROCKI, STACY ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF FEB-18-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF FEB-18-2015 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT EXCEPT DEFENDANT STACY NAWROCKI WHO WAS NOT PRESENT AT THE HEARING. NO PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT STACY NAWROCKI. NO COSTS AWARDED BY COURT ON THE DEFENDANTS CLAIM. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED JAN-07-2015, COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT NAWROCKI, MATT
CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AS TO STACY NAWROCKI BY COURT AT SMALL CLAIM HEARING OF FEB-18-2015 AT 3:30 PM.
THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT CROSS COMPLAINANT NAWROCKI, MATT IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY CROSS DEFENDANT SIEGEL, LAURENCE STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CLAIM OF DEFENDANT FOR $1,026.78 FILED BY NAWROCKI, MATT AS TO CROSS DEFENDANT SIEGEL, LAURENCE ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-18-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-18-2015 - JUDGMENT.

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SIEGEL, LAURENCE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT NAWROCKI, MATT $599.06 PRINCIPAL, $80.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $679.06, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AGAINST STACY NAWROCKI IS DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE AT PLAINTIFF'S REQUEST. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
